category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-North Macedonia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入北马其顿：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入北馬其頓：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against North Macedonia CE-style expectations, ISRSM / TS EN IEC 61851 technical alignment, ERC charging-service licensing expectations, MEPSO grid project approval, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector compatibility, OCPP interoperability, and safety / EMC evidence.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与北马其顿 CE 风格要求、ISRSM 与 TS EN IEC 61851 技术对应、ERC 充电服务许可、MEPSO 电网项目审批、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口兼容性、OCPP 以及安全/EMC证据的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與北馬其頓 CE 風格要求、ISRSM 與 TS EN IEC 61851 技術對應、ERC 充電服務許可、MEPSO 電網專案審批、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 接口相容性、OCPP 以及安全 / EMC 證據的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, CE scope determination, TSE/ISRSM standards interpretation, ERC licensing assessment, MEPSO grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charging-network operators, and installers should verify current North Macedonia CE alignment, ISRSM standards, ERC, MEPSO, electrical-installation, data, payment, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, installation, or operation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、CE适用范围裁定、TSE/ISRSM标准解释、ERC许可评审、MEPSO并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电网络运营方和安装方在出货、销售、安装或运营前应与合格专业人士核实现行北马其顿 CE 对齐、ISRSM标准、ERC、MEPSO、电气安装、数据、支付及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、CE 適用範圍裁定、TSE/ISRSM 標準解釋、ERC 許可評估、MEPSO 併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電網路營運方和安裝方在出貨、銷售、安裝或營運前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行北馬其頓 CE 對齊、ISRSM 標準、ERC、MEPSO、電氣安裝、資料、支付及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering North Macedonia, the main practical gaps are CE technical-file and declaration work for applicable EU-aligned product legislation, TS EN IEC 61851 technical alignment, GB/T-to-IEC Type 2 or CCS2 connector redesign, ERC charging-network licensing for public charging service operations, MEPSO and distribution-company grid project review, OCPP backend interoperability, and EMC / residual-current protection evidence. Do not assume a blanket whole-unit approval without checking the exact model, voltage, corridor route to Thessaloniki via Greece, installation route, and use case.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造充电桩进入北马其顿时，主要实际差距包括适用欧盟协调产品法规下的CE技术文件与符合性声明、TS EN IEC 61851技术对应、GB/T到IEC Type 2或CCS2接口重新设计、公共充电服务运营的 ERC 许可、MEPSO及配电公司电网项目审查、OCPP后台互操作，以及EMC/剩余电流保护证据。不应在未核实具体型号、电压、通过希腊塞萨洛尼基走廊的运输路线、安装路径和用途前，假定存在统一的整机批准。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁進入北馬其頓時，主要實際差距包括適用歐盟協調產品法規下的 CE 技術文件與符合性聲明、TS EN IEC 61851 技術對應、GB/T 到 IEC Type 2 或 CCS2 接口重新設計、公共充電服務營運之 ERC 許可、MEPSO 及配電公司電網專案審查、OCPP 後台互通，以及 EMC/剩餘電流保護證據。未核實具體型號、電壓、透過希臘色薩洛尼基走廊的路線、安裝路徑和用途前，不應假定存在統一的整機批准。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, government gazette, grid operator, conformity assessment body, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
